title: Incidental Medical Expense Assistance * Cancer - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Incidental Medical Expense Assistance * Cancer 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Breast Cancer Cancer Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CANCERCARE FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides limited financial assistance for cancer-related transportation, child care and home care expenses. Funding depends on the sources of support received at any given time. If no funding is available, professional oncology social workers will refer to other financial assistance resources. Does not cover basic living expenses such as rent, mortgages, utility payments or food. 485 Madison Avenue New York, NY 10022 Eligibility: Have a diagnosis of cancer confirmed by an oncology health care provider, be in active treatment for cancer, live in the US or Puerto Rico, and meet other eligibility guidelines based on the Federal Poverty Limit. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7am-3pm, Friday 7am-2pm Email (800) 813-4673 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DOUGLAS COUNTY CANCER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides programs such as patient travel assistance, patient financial assistance, wigs, hats, bras, and breast prostheses. 2880 NW Stewart Parkway Suite 202 Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Individuals who have been diagnosed with cancer Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm Email (541) 440-9409 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LEUKEMIA AND LYMPHOMA SOCIETY FINANCIAL SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medical expense assistance programs to help with insurance co-payments and/or insurance premium costs for prescription drugs related to blood cancer treatment. Also, may Provide financial assistance for ground transportation, air travel, and lodging-related expenses. 3 International Drive Suite 200 Rye Brook, NY 10573 Eligibility: -Must have a confirmed blood cancer diagnosis -Must have income no higher than 500% of the Federal Poverty Level -Must be a United States citizen or permanent resident Additionally, for the Co-Pay Assistance Program: Must have medical and/or prescription insurance Hours: Monday-Friday 6am-6pm Email (877) 557-2672 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DOUGLAS COUNTY CANCER SERVICES DOUGLAS COUNTY CANCER SERVICES
